scripts.dev: pnpm run dev:services && npx --yes concurrently -k -p "[{name}]" -n "backend,frontend" -c "magenta,cyan" "pnpm run dev:backend" "pnpm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: docker run --rm -v ./backend:/app -w /app --network tools-deps-network -e DATABASE_URL=postgres://test:test@postgres:5432/tools_test -e REDIS_URL=redis://redis:6379 -p 3001:3001 rust:1.90.0 cargo run --bin tools-backend
scripts.dev:frontend: cd frontend && cross-env NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:3001 pnpm run dev
scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:frontend && pnpm run lint:css && pnpm run lint:backend
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm run lint:fix:frontend && pnpm run lint:css:fix && pnpm run lint:fix:backend
scripts.format: pnpm run format:frontend && pnpm run format:backend
